summary: Clarified the opening report redraft to track cleanly from Chapter 2 and sharpened the closing handoff so Elise carries Vautrin's bomb-frame back into the quarry for Chapter 4.
edits: Clarified that Elise is recopying the surviving lines of her report rather than drafting the whole note from scratch.
Adjusted the final paragraphs so Vautrin's conspiracy logic follows Elise back to the wine-shop cellar and sets up Chapter 4's bomb question.
